title: oenothera biennis subsp. suaveolens
intro: Oenothera biennis subsp. suaveolens, also known as Sweet Evening Primrose, is a subspecies of the Evening Primrose (Oenothera biennis) plant, characterized by its fragrant, pinkish-purple flowers and a sweet, honey-like scent. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). Sweet Evening Primrose has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and oils, and is also used as an ingredient in skincare products, making it a popular natural remedy for various health concerns.
